title: People Column within Boards
excerpt: Is there a way to change the People column in the boards to display a name rather than the picture or icon circle?  Our users call it a speck of rice. They prefer to display a name.

posts.author: ajhale21 (Amie Hale)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to change the People column in the boards to display a name rather than the picture or icon circle? Our users call it a speck of rice. They prefer to display a name.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ajhale21 ,

you can easily achieve this using Make.com

After creating a text column in Monday.com you can trigger a webhook for when an item created after this you can go to make.com ,

1 . watch Events : Trigger when an item created
2 . get a user: Get the user using the person id
3 . Update column value of a specific item : this will update the text field with the name of person
